prompt: Add webhook notifications to Slack and Discord when builds complete

turns.content:
<task>
Send webhook notifications to both Slack and Discord when a CI build completes (success or failure).
</task>
Found: Slack Incoming Webhook API - POST to webhook URL with Content-Type: application/json. Simple: {"text": "message"}. Rich: {"blocks": [...]}

arguments.query: Discord webhook API POST JSON format embeds color

arguments.title: Discord webhook API

arguments.summary: Have Slack webhook docs from previous finding. Researched Discord webhook format. Will create unified notifier.

next_steps.description: Create internal/notify/notifier.go with Slack and Discord webhook delivery
Wire notifications into build completion in runner.go

arguments.message: Notifier is ready with both Slack and Discord support. Slack uses emoji prefixes, Discord uses colored embeds (green for success, red for failure). Call NotifySlack/NotifyDiscord after build completion with the webhook URLs from config.

arguments.summary: Created notification module supporting both Slack (text with emoji) and Discord (colored embeds) webhook delivery. Shared postJSON helper.
arguments.final_answer: Webhook notifications for Slack and Discord implemented. Slack uses emoji-prefixed text. Discord uses colored embeds (green/red). Both share a postJSON helper with timeout.
